one_time_description: Drinking water settlement of $500,000 received as non-recurring revenue
economic_notes: Nation has three GBEs: Marble Canyon Forestry Ltd., 0436158 B.C. Ltd., and Ts'kw'aylaxw Forest Co. Ltd. Also holds investments in BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing General Partner Inc. and BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership. Significant economic dependence on ISC Comprehensive Funding Arrangement and First Nations Health Authority.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Audit report dated April 15, 2025 — unusually late for a March 2023 year-end. Drinking water settlement of $500,000 is a likely one-time item. St'at'imc Trust payment of $640,000 also appears non-recurring. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $5,507,653 + Province of BC $943,798 + FNHA $703,356 + CMHC $260,840 + Natural Resources Canada $180,000 + FNESC $71,831 + Property tax $655 = $7,667,333; St'at'imc Trust $640,000 included brings total to $8,307,333 — ISC figure includes deferred revenue recognition. Housing expenses include both Housing ($332,976) and Social Housing ($130,690) = $463,666. Three GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis with combined negative equity of $(151,738). No remuneration schedule found in the document.
